title: selaginella schefferi
intro: Selaginella schefferi, also known as Spikemoss, is a species of plant in the Selaginellaceae family, belonging to the order Selaginellales, and is a type of ancient, lycopod-like vegetation. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help to soothe and treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Selaginella schefferi include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant protection. Selaginella schefferi can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and effective natural remedy.
